episode.title: In conversation with Reid Hoffman & Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

chunks.text: Bestie intros: Buttons are back for fall
Reid Hoffman joins the show, reminiscing on PayPal stories with Sacks
State of AI: Nvidia, cluster buildouts, competition
OpenAI's corporate structure and thoughts on Elon's lawsuit
Inflection AI's deal structure with Microsoft, Lina Khan's impact on the tech industry
Reid's perspective on Kamala being hot swapped for Biden, funding groups that attempted to keep RFK Jr. off ballots
Thoughts on Kamala's economic proposals: price caps, wealth tax, etc
How Silicon Valley views both candidates, why Reid funded legal action against Trump
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. joins the show and recaps his campaign and decision to back Trump
Falling out with the Democratic Party
Potential role in the Trump Administration, Make America Healthy Again agenda

Sacks recaps RFK Jr's campaign, RFK Jr. on Trump's legacy Follow the besties: https://x.com/chamath https://x.com/Jason https://x.com/DavidSacks https://x.com/friedberg Follow Reid Hoffman: https://x.com/reidhoffman Follow Robert F.
